name: powerbi-agent
description: Turn your AI Agent into a Power BI analyst. 4 skills (kpim-analysis · pbi-pipeline · powerbi-mcp · pbi-knowledge), 6 /pbi-* commands, and the pbi-knowledge-curator agent. For the 16 MCP tools (DAX/model/report/knowledge) run install.ps1 in the repo root — this plugin ships the workflows & knowledge layer. Built by KPIM (kpim.vn), shared free.
